environment.backend_mode: local uvicorn with live access-log verification

results.title: Customer email sign-in completes backend authentication
results.details: Firebase auth and backend API calls completed, but post-login navigation could not be treated as pass because the customer Home screen immediately threw a React render error.

results.title: Customer home and search click-through load after login
results.details: Confirmed product defect. After successful customer login, Home crashes with ReactNativeJS error: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {query, timestamp}). Search flow could not continue from Home.

results.title: Business email login and dashboard load
results.details: Business login succeeded from a clean app state and the business dashboard loaded with bottom tabs including Products, Orders, and More.

results.title: Business AI Advisor click-through from dashboard
results.details: Business dashboard state was valid, but AI Advisor navigation was not reliably validated in the same pass with the current raw adb/uiautomator harness.

bugs.title: Customer Home crashes after login when recent search history contains objects
bugs.evidence: ReactNativeJS log: Objects are not valid as a React child (found: object with keys {query, timestamp})
bugs.likely_source: d:/Local_shop/nearshop-mobile/app/(customer)/home.jsx lines 512-518 render recentSearches items directly as text and use encodeURIComponent(query), but API history items are objects. Data is set at lines 128-129 from historyRes.value?.data?.history.
bugs.impact: Customer home feed does not render after login for affected users; search flow from home is blocked.

notes: Firebase email authentication succeeded on emulator and backend access logs confirmed follow-up API activity for the customer session.
The confirmed app defect occurs on the customer Home render path, not at credential validation.
Business dashboard coverage is valid; AI Advisor remains pending more stable navigation automation or a targeted manual walkthrough.
